  "findings": [
    "No fire watch present during hot work operations",
    "No fire watch present during the mandatory post-work monitoring period"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately halt all hot work activities in the area",
    "Establish a dedicated, qualified fire watch for the duration of the work and the required post-work monitoring period",
    "Perform a thorough inspection of the area for smoldering fires or hazards before resuming work"
  ],
  "rationale": "NFPA 51B and OSHA 1926 Subpart J strictly require a dedicated fire watch during hot work and for a minimum of 30 minutes (or up to 60 minutes depending on local permits) after hot work is completed to detect and extinguish smoldering fires. Performing hot work without a fire watch is a critical safety violation.",
  "references": [
    "NFPA 51B Section 5.6",
    "OSHA 1926.352(e)"
  ]
}
